metadata.description: AI Ready Life — 20 domain plugins for personal life management. Install one domain at a time.

plugins.name: health
plugins.description: 2 AI agents that manage your personal health — wellness tracking, lab review, medication monitoring, appointment management, and insurance/HSA oversight.

plugins.name: wealth
plugins.description: 2 AI agents that manage your personal wealth — net worth tracking, investment performance, cash flow analysis, and estate planning oversight.

plugins.name: tax
plugins.description: 2 AI agents that manage your personal tax picture — deadline tracking, estimate calculations, deduction reviews, entity compliance, and accountant readiness.

plugins.name: career
plugins.description: 2 AI agents that manage your career — compensation benchmarking, job market scanning, application pipeline, skills gap analysis, and network outreach.

plugins.name: benefits
plugins.description: 2 AI agents — Chief of Staff + Benefits Director. Maximize your 401k match, HSA triple-tax advantage, and coverage optimization.

plugins.name: brand
plugins.description: 2 AI agents — Chief of Staff + Brand Director. Consistent brand presence, mention monitoring, analytics tracking, and monthly synthesis reports.

plugins.name: business
plugins.description: 2 AI agents — Chief of Staff + Chief Corporate Officer. Track LLC/entity revenue and expenses, compliance deadlines, and books.

plugins.name: ben
plugins.description: 1 AI agent — your personal Chief of Staff. Orchestrates all other life plugins, synthesizes daily briefs, syncs tasks, and monitors priorities.

plugins.name: calendar
plugins.description: 2 AI agents — Chief of Staff + Calendar Director. Protect focus time, surface deadlines before they're urgent, align schedule with priorities.

plugins.name: content
plugins.description: 2 AI agents that manage your content business — YouTube analytics, newsletter metrics, LinkedIn growth, Gumroad revenue, and publishing schedule.

plugins.name: estate
plugins.description: 2 AI agents that manage your rental property portfolio — cash flow tracking, tenant management, maintenance, insurance, and investment performance.

plugins.name: explore
plugins.description: 1 AI agent that manages your travel life — trip planning, passport and document status, travel wishlist, and upcoming adventure prep.

plugins.name: home
plugins.description: 1 AI agent that manages your home — maintenance tracking, home expenses, seasonal task lists, and household organization.

plugins.name: insurance
plugins.description: 2 AI agents that manage all your insurance policies — health, life, auto, home/renters, umbrella. Renewal tracking, coverage gap analysis, and claims.

plugins.name: intel
plugins.description: 1 AI agent that scans your curated news sources daily — AI, tech, finance, and world news filtered to your interests.

plugins.name: learning
plugins.description: 1 AI agent that manages your skill development — active courses, reading list, certifications, and learning goals.

plugins.name: real-estate
plugins.description: 1 AI agent focused on real estate market research — home purchase analysis, buy vs. rent decisions, market trends, and portfolio expansion strategy.

plugins.name: records
plugins.description: 1 AI agent that manages your document inventory and subscriptions — tracks expiring IDs, memberships, subscriptions to cancel.

plugins.name: social
plugins.description: 1 AI agent that manages your personal relationships — birthday and milestone tracking, relationship health scores, check-in reminders.

plugins.name: vision
plugins.description: 2 AI agents focused on your life vision — quarterly planning, goal tracking, 13-domain life scorecard, and strategic alignment.
